Nice atmosphere and cliental.  Not too loud.

Understocking, employee discount... I got a sound system with a 20% discount on the last day of that discount for an item readily available. black friday has this item 43% off, which is more then the 20%. Item still available a day into the sale. They wouldn't give the difference because it was a employee discount buy and is called understocking. Give me a break, the item will continue to be available for eternity. If a customer (non employee) had the same situation, they would give you the difference. I understand understocking if its an item your getting before a non employee like a new xbox on day one but this item has been around forever. complete BS

Solid choice for dinner at the Atlantis. It's on the second floor so a bit out of the way of all the casino noise and smoke. Nice menu and solid wine list. I especially thought the featured vineyard wines were a good value. My 12 glass of Pinot Noir was huge.

Food was good. My lamb shank was fall apart delicious and my husband's pork chop was huge, though a bit over cooked. Unfortunately the vegetables were really undercooked, carrots were basically raw. But overall a nice meal.

My husband had the crème brûlée and I had a truffle and port pairing that was really nice.

The place does a lot of happy hour and that's probably a good choice too. 

Service was not as good as I expected, felt a little rushed for as nice a place, and not super friendly, except for our bus guy, Mark Anthony, who was excellent.

Every time I've come here, I've had to wait an addition hour for my dog to be seen. Doesn't matter if it's busy or empty, they will not see you on time. I understand a vet can't see you right on your appointment and it may take an additional 10-20 mins but they go far beyond that. Aside from that the majority of the stuff has an attitude problem, not very friendly.

Very nice and clean place, just needs better management.
Good beer and delicious food, but the wait staff could have been quicker - thought the waitress was very friendly.  We had a great time and got what we expected.

#PlanetBeauty: I'm in a bit of a rush and enter this store looking for sulphate-free shampoo for my colored hair. My hair salon only carries the $50/bottle kind-too much for soap in my opinion and figure P.Beauty will offer a range. The store is empty when I enter. I tell the sales woman what I'm looking for and she leads me to the expensive products. "No, I'd like a less expen--"  but the phone rings. She answers it without saying anything to me like "Excuse me for one moment..." I hear her chatting about what's up later this evening, obviously talking to a friend while I'm standing there waiting for direction. She hangs up & I ask her to point me to some less expensive shampoos. Then a lady walks in. She turns from me to her without saying "Excuse me..." and starts talking. Evidently, the lady wanted to make a hair appt, not with her, but she pulls out the book and they begin chatting about best days to come in, etc. 
You know the end of this story: I left. 
Can't give this retail store any stars. They may indeed have great products but I wouldn't know because the sales help didn't want to help me find them.

So on opening night it appears they are not ready to open. Small  things overlooked that I'm sure for the price tag they paid for this place was an oversight.  Stage is awkwardly placed,  second level has poor view of the acts. Handrails falling  apart  tables are simply  poor craftsmanship. Basically some laminate flooring as a table, very underimpressed. Knowing who backed this place I would expect way more,hopefully they put on the finishing touches over the next few weeks. First impression leaves something to be desired. On the bright side the staff they hired is super friendly,  very engaging bar tenders. They will probably do just fine once they work out some kinks

This is great food. The owners are very nice and the Gravy (sauce) is to die for! Whatever you order will be amazing trust me. You can tell they take there cooking from scratch seriously when they have Herbs growing around the restaurant. 
Big Portions, like Mama use to give

Beautiful atmosphere...loved the prime rib sandwich at Harry & Izzys and thought I was getting the same thing here....noooo...no great slices of beef.just one hunk of fatty meat...sorry Lounge..know you're new...keep trying...

I love supporting local business... but buyers beware !  I went to Barto and my sales person was Frank Mumphrey.. who seemed very knowledgeable and assisted me with trying to find out what I wanted.  After we looked at the items in the back, I picked out several Frigidaire appliances that I loved.  At this time Frank told me about a "rebate" that would work perfectly for me, and if I picked out 3 items I would get a $150.00 rebate!  Sealed the deal for me so I got 3 items I liked. Well I submit the paperwork for the rebate and I was told that the rebate was expired.  Well I get with Frank and he told me that it was a error and he would help me to fix the problem, I guess this was the way of blowing me off : ( 
Since November 2017 I have been "working" with Frank to help solve the problem, but since December 15, 2017 Frank has refused to return phone calls and has not responded to emails.
So just wanted to let people know PLEASE pay attention to the small print when you are told something because it appears that you will be told anything to make a sale, and customer service is not important after you make a purchase.
